MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-25-2014 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE. TIMOTHY HAMILTON APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DAVID BARCH APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT BAY MED EXPRESS INC. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO 36(A)CCP. AFTER OBJECTING TO THE FINDING OF CCP36(A) BUT WITHOUT WAIVING THAT PARTIES AGREE TO ACCOMPLISH TRIAL PREPARATION BY HAVING THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT HEARD ON SHORTENED TIME BY THE COURT'S ORDER ON 1/9/15. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WILL BE SERVED BY 12/2/14 WITH OPPOSITION DUE BY 1/2/15 AND REPLY DUE BY 1/7/15. E-MAIL SERVICE IS CONSIDERED AND ALL COURTESY COPIES MUST BE DELIVERED TO THE DEPARTMENT. EXPERT DISCOVERY WILL REMAIN OPEN UNTIL 1/9/15 AND REGULAR DISCOVERY WILL BE CLOSED BY 12/29/14. ALL PAPER DISCOVERY MUST BE SERVED BOTH WAYS BY 21 DAYS. ALL DISCOVERY DISPUTES WILL BE ADDRESSED TO JUDGE MCBRIDE IN THE FORM OF A LETTER BRIEF. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT WILL BE E-MAILED IN A WORD DOCUMENT TO JUDGE MCBRIDE. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: RVELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
